summary: Comprehensive testing of Squarerootz AI EdTech platform completed successfully. Backend APIs (14/14 tests passed), frontend pages, authentication, enrollment flow with demo payment, and dashboard all working correctly. High-quality UI/UX design implementing Apple design principles with liquid glass morphism effects.
passed_tests: All 14 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
All frontend pages loading correctly (Home, Courses, About, Pricing, Contact, Dashboard)
Course filtering and search functionality working
Authentication flow with session tokens working
Enrollment flow with demo payment mode working
Contact form submission with success feedback
Glass morphism UI design implemented properly
Course detail pages showing complete information (syllabus, pricing, instructor)
